info.name: QuanLyDonHangNoiBo API - All Features
info.description:
Collection test tat ca tinh nang HTTP cua du an QuanLyDonHangNoiBo.
Chay theo thu tu folder tu tren xuong duoi. Dang nhap demo: tenantCode=demo, admin@demo.vn / Demo@123.
Cac request Tenants can superAdminToken rieng; tai khoan demo TenantAdmin dung de xac nhan 403.
SignalR duoc cover bang endpoint negotiate cua 4 hub: orders, delivery, notifications, dashboard.

Tenant CRUD yeu cau SuperAdmin. Du an seed mac dinh khong co SuperAdmin token.
